title: 【转贴】强国断交部说日本的核污染水和强国核电站的污水本质不同
meta_description: 【转贴】强国断交部说日本的核污染水和强国核电站的污水本质不同 - https://www.theguardian.com/environment/2023/aug/25/fukushima-daiichi-nuclear-power-plant-china-wastewater-release  [quote]“Ther...
meta_keywords: 转贴,强国,断交部,日本,污染,核电,污水,本质,不同
contents:
https://www.theguardian.com/environment/2023/aug/25/fukushima-daiichi-nuclear-power-plant-china-wastewater-release

“There is a fundamental difference between the nuclear-contaminated water that came into direct contact with the melted reactor cores in the Fukushima nuclear disaster and the water released by nuclear power plants in normal operation,” foreign ministry spokesperson Wang Wenbin said on Wednesday. “They are different in nature, come from different sources and require different levels of sophistication to handle.”


强国断脚部认为，日本排海污水是核污染事故处理水，强国的核电站排污水是核电站常规运作排污，本质不同，

且不说日本的排放标准和ＵＮ监管下批准的行动，我想问他一句，

你媳妇出轨野男人媾和染上ｓｔｄ通过正常夫妻生活再传给你，这和土匪高官玩女人嫖娼染上的同一种ｓｔｄ难道是本质不同的病毒或者细菌，只要是同一种化学物质，还有党性之分？？？
